SkillProbe Session Behavior Map

Run-level evidence map for the final dataset. Model is encoded by color and condition by opacity: C1 low, C2 medium, C3 high. This is not a turn-by-turn timeline because full conversation and tool-call traces are not present in the released results.

AGENTS.md cells indicate prompt exposure, not confirmed file-read timing. N/A cells indicate the raw-result schema did not expose that feature family.

Model x Condition Stage-C Coverage

Click a row for details. Hover cells for feature definitions.
